title: Mana Crystals
description: Way to increase maximum mana permanently!
body:
Adds Mana crystals to the game to increase your maximum mana!

Requires [Iron's Spellbooks](https://modrinth.com/mod/irons-spells-n-spellbooks) to be installed

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b15975ff7fc4cc92b8b7a2b851b36660d8f9fe66.png)

Mana Crystals increase your maximum mana by 10 each time one is used for a maximum of 10 uses (so 100 extra mana can be gotten through mana crystals) 

These crystals can be obtained by crafting them using 9 mana crystal shards, and those can be crafted using 9 mana dust.

Mana Dust can be crafted using basic materials such as lapis lazuli and arcane essence
